heading: query
body:
The `explain` response is a BSON (Binary Javascript Object Notation) document with keys and values
describing the execution statistics for the query. The `explain`
document in the result set contains the following fields:

| Field | Type     | Necessity | Purpose                                                                                |
| ----- | -------- | --------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| path  | string   | Optional  | Path to the queried embedding field, only if it isn't the root.                        |
| type  | string   | Required  | Name of the type of vector search query. See query for more information.               |
| args  | document | Required  | Vector search query information. See query for more information.                       |
| stats | document | Optional  | stats for the query if explain ran with executionStats or allPlansExecution verbosity. |
